hooks.command: if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then gofmt -w "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20; fi
hooks.description: Run go vet on Go file changes

hooks.command: if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && go build ./... 2>&1 | head -20; fi
cd "D:/Mycase/tarot-agent" && go build ./... && go test ./... 2>&1 | tail -20
hooks.description: Final build + test verification at session end
